evals.name: Execution Audit Summary
evals.prompt:
After completing a governed AAP execution workflow, you need to generate an audit trail.

Describe your execution summary methodology: what information you collect from the session, how you structure the audit report, and what categories of data you track (documents consulted, tools used, decisions made, outcomes).
evals.expected_output: An audit summary methodology that tracks documents consulted, MCP tools invoked with parameters, governance decisions made with classifications, human approval interactions, and final outcomes in a structured report format.
assertions: The output describes tracking which governance documents were consulted during the workflow and what topics they informed.
The output describes tracking MCP tools invoked with their parameters and summarized results.
The output describes tracking governance decisions made (risk classifications, PASS/GAP/WARN assessments) and their basis.
The output describes tracking human interactions: what approvals were requested and what the user decided.
